description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with clean, angular lines and a flat, multi-level roof structure. The exterior is predominantly white with large glass windows, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. A swimming pool is integrated into the outdoor space, adjacent to a patio area, enhancing the luxurious feel. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a driveway and landscaped surroundings. Multiple balconies and terraces are visible, offering outdoor living spaces on both levels. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and an integrated swimming pool, featuring minimalist white facades and outdoor terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered roof structure and the pool area extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional terraces, a secondary entrance, and more window arrangements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the driveway, garage area, and further details of the pool and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door, small steps, and a covered overhang with no ornate decorations.
